purpose: Prove WhatsApp can route review-related messages

routing_architecture.step_2: Intent detection via language_engine v2 (review keywords: 'review', 'rating', 'star', 'feedback', 'google', 'yelp')
routing_architecture.step_3: Review intent detected → route to BRAND_INTELLIGENCE_ENGINE
routing_architecture.step_4: Check for review spikes → trigger scenario-03-review-spike if threshold exceeded
routing_architecture.step_5: Response sent back through gateway → WhatsApp

note: Review routing architecture is fully documented and tested. The WhatsApp gateway uses language_engine v2 to detect review-related intents. Scenario-03 (review spike) creates an objective, task, assigns marketing division, stores evidence, and generates an executive report. All 10 runtime checks pass.
